glosses.vi: đường kẻ; tuyến (xe buýt/tàu điện ngầm)
glosses.ja: 線; 路線（バス/地下鉄）

sentences.target: Ich nehme die Linie 3 zum Markt.
sentences.reading: /ɪç ˈneːmə diː ˈliːni̯ə dʁaɪ̯ tsʊm maʁkt./

translations.de: Ich nehme die Linie 3 zum Markt.
translations.ipa: /ɪç ˈneːmə diː ˈliːni̯ə dʁaɪ̯ tsʊm maʁkt./
translations.en: I’m taking line 3 to the market.
translations.es: Tomo la línea 3 hasta el mercado.
translations.fr: Je prends la ligne 3 jusqu’au marché.
translations.it: Prendo la linea 3 per il mercato.
translations.ru: Я еду на автобусе номер 3 на рынок.
translations.pt: Vou de ônibus da linha 3 até o mercado.
translations.vi: Tôi đi tuyến số 3 đến chợ.
translations.nl: Ik neem lijn 3 naar de markt.
translations.uk: Я їду автобусом номер 3 на ринок.
translations.hi: मैं लाइन 3 से बाज़ार जा रहा हूँ.
translations.el: Παίρνω τη γραμμή 3 για την αγορά.
translations.id: Saya naik bus nomor 3 ke pasar.
translations.ja: 3番のバスで市場に行きます。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person singular, nominative; subject of the clause.
Finite lexical verb, present tense, 1st person singular.
Definite article, feminine singular, accusative; agrees with 'Linie'.
Common noun, feminine; direct object; head of the NP 'die Linie 3'.
Cardinal numeral specifying the line number; numeric modifier of 'Linie'.
Preposition (contraction of 'zu dem'), governs dative; marks goal/destination.
Common noun, masculine; object of the preposition 'zu(m)'; dative singular by government.

sentences.target: Ich ziehe eine Linie unter den Text.
sentences.reading: /ɪç ˈtsiːə ˈaɪ̯nə ˈliːni̯ə ˈʊntɐ deːn tɛkst./

translations.de: Ich ziehe eine Linie unter den Text.
translations.ipa: /ɪç ˈtsiːə ˈaɪ̯nə ˈliːni̯ə ˈʊntɐ deːn tɛkst./
translations.en: I draw a line under the text.
translations.zh-Hans: 我在文字下面画一条线。
translations.yue: 我喺文字下面畫一條線。
translations.vi: Tôi gạch một đường dưới đoạn chữ.
translations.nl: Ik zet een streep onder de tekst.
translations.hi: मैं टेक्स्ट के नीचे एक लाइन खींचता हूँ.
translations.nb: Jeg setter en strek under teksten.
translations.da: Jeg sætter en streg under teksten.
translations.ja: テキストに下線を引きます。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person singular, nominative; subject.
Finite lexical verb, present tense, 1st person singular; here in the sense of 'to draw (a line)'.
Indefinite article, feminine singular, accusative; agrees with 'Linie'.
Common noun, feminine; direct object of 'ziehe'.
Preposition; here with accusative indicating direction (to a position under).
Definite article, masculine singular, accusative; agrees with 'Text' as object of 'unter'.
Common noun, masculine; object of the preposition 'unter'.

sentences.target: Wir warten hinter der Linie am Bahnsteig.
sentences.reading: /viːɐ̯ ˈvaʁtn̩ ˈhɪntɐ deːɐ̯ ˈliːni̯ə am ˈbaːnʃtaɪ̯k./

translations.de: Wir warten hinter der Linie am Bahnsteig.
translations.ipa: /viːɐ̯ ˈvaʁtn̩ ˈhɪntɐ deːɐ̯ ˈliːni̯ə am ˈbaːnʃtaɪ̯k./
translations.en: We wait behind the line on the platform.
translations.es: Esperamos detrás de la línea en el andén.
translations.fr: On attend derrière la ligne sur le quai.
translations.it: Aspettiamo dietro la linea sulla banchina.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们在站台的安全线后面等。
translations.yue: 我哋喺月台嘅安全線後面等。
translations.ru: Мы ждём на платформе за линией.
translations.pt: Esperamos atrás da linha na plataforma.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi đợi sau vạch kẻ trên sân ga.
translations.nl: We wachten achter de streep op het perron.
translations.uk: Ми чекаємо за лінією на платформі.
translations.hu: A peronon a vonal mögött várunk.
translations.hi: हम प्लेटफ़ॉर्म पर लाइन के पीछे इंतज़ार करते हैं.
translations.el: Περιμένουμε πίσω από τη γραμμή στην αποβάθρα.
translations.nb: Vi venter bak linjen på plattformen.
translations.id: Kami menunggu di belakang garis di peron.
translations.sv: Vi väntar bakom linjen på perrongen.
translations.ro: Așteptăm în spatele liniei pe peron.
translations.da: Vi venter bag linjen på perronen.
translations.ja: ホームの線の後ろで待ちます。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person plural, nominative; subject.
Finite lexical verb, present tense, 1st person plural.
Preposition; with dative for location ('behind').
Definite article, feminine singular, dative; agrees with 'Linie' after 'hinter' (location).
Common noun, feminine; object of the preposition 'hinter'.
Preposition (contraction of 'an dem'), governs dative; marks location.
Common noun, masculine; object of the preposition 'an(m)'; dative singular by government.

sentences.target: Die neue Linie hält hier nicht.

translations.de: Die neue Linie hält hier nicht.
translations.en: The new line doesn’t stop here.
translations.es: La nueva línea no para aquí.
translations.fr: La nouvelle ligne ne s’arrête pas ici.
translations.it: La nuova linea non si ferma qui.
translations.zh-Hans: 新开的线路不停靠这里。
translations.pt: A nova linha não para aqui.
translations.vi: Tuyến mới không dừng ở đây.
translations.nl: De nieuwe lijn stopt hier niet.
translations.hu: Az új járat itt nem áll meg.
translations.hi: नई लाइन यहाँ नहीं रुकती है.
translations.pl: Nowa linia nie zatrzymuje się tutaj.
translations.el: Η νέα γραμμή δεν σταματά εδώ.
translations.nb: Den nye linjen stopper ikke her.
translations.id: Rute baru tidak berhenti di sini.
translations.sv: Den nya linjen stannar inte här.
translations.da: Den nye linje stopper ikke her.
translations.ja: 新しい路線はここに停まりません。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, feminine singular, nominative; marks the subject NP.
Attributive adjective modifying 'Linie'; feminine singular, nominative (weak inflection after definite article).
Common noun, feminine; subject of the clause.
Finite lexical verb, present tense, 3rd person singular.
Adverb of place.
Negation particle; negates the predicate.
